properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh Lord, we praise You Oh Lord, we magnify You Oh Lord, we lift Your name up High in all the earth Oh Lord, we magnify Thee and bless Bless Your holy name Oh Lord, we lift Your name up High in all the earth High in all the earth High in all the earth

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh Lord, we praise You Oh Lord, we glorify You Oh Lord, we lift Your name up High in all the earth Oh Lord, we magnify Thee and bless Bless Your Holy name Oh Lord, we lift Your name up High in all the earth High in all the earth High in all the earth

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: With my voice I'll sing Your praises Think well of You and all Your greatness With my whole heart I'm gonna lift Your name up High in all the earth May this song of praise and adoration Bless Thee o Lord and (?) As all the nations lift Your name up High in all the earth High in all the earth High in all the earth

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We lift Your name high High in all the earth High in all the earth High in all the earth

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We lift Your name high We lift Your name high We lift Your name high

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: We lift your name high High in all the earth High in all the earth High in all the earth

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We lift Your name high High in all the earth
